name: voiceuse-computer-control
description: Codex plugin that exposes VoiceUse desktop observation and control tools through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Give Codex tools to observe and control the local desktop through VoiceUse.
interface.longDescription: Exposes VoiceUse desktop tools through MCP so Codex can own the observe, reason, act, verify computer-use loop while VoiceUse provides screenshots, window focus, typing, clicking, and audit-safe execution adapters.
defaultPrompt: Use VoiceUse tools to complete this desktop task.
Observe the screen, act, then verify the result.
List windows and focus the app I name.
